title: knowledge curation retention sweep opened
body: Owner requested knowledge curation after the consolidation audit. I consulted the live broad skill-audit claim 4aa64a3d; per respect-active-agent-claims, shared-state surfaces are writable coordination surfaces, not write locks. Proceeding with caution under claim 309a602a: delete only comms-events older than 2026-05-05 after checking durable routing, update repo-continuity with the retention outcome, and regenerate shared-comms-log. I will not touch active skill-audit source files.
